corrections.text: The article quotes Levi Garraway as saying 'serial ctDNA testing to detect molecular residual disease may advance bladder cancer treatment.' The Oncozine source records the full statement as: 'The use of serial ctDNA testing to detect molecular residual disease may also advance bladder cancer treatment by combining a precision diagnostic with cancer immunotherapy.' The published quote omits 'also' and truncates the second clause of the sentence; it is a paraphrase, not a verbatim quotation.
